introSection: Rutschebanen is a wooden roller coaster located at Bakken in Klampenborg, Sjælland, Denmark.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: The Cable lift hill uses a 22 mm wire at a speed of approximately 5.5 m/s.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: The trains are build by KumbaK. These replaced the original brakeman trains in 2010.

fullText:
Rutschebanen is a wooden roller coaster located at Bakken in Klampenborg, Sjælland, Denmark.

The Cable lift hill uses a 22 mm wire at a speed of approximately 5.5 m/s.

The trains are build by KumbaK. These replaced the original brakeman trains in 2010.
